description_zh: 综述论文：范围、分类体系、检索来源、纳入标准、方法、发现和研究空白。
description_en: Survey papers covering scope, taxonomy, sources, inclusion criteria, reviewed methods, findings, and gaps.

fields.name: scope
fields.description: Extract the topic, research questions, and boundaries of the review.

fields.name: taxonomy
fields.description: Extract the taxonomy, conceptual framework, or categories proposed by the review.

fields.name: search_sources
fields.description: Extract databases, repositories, venues, and search periods used to find studies.

fields.name: inclusion_criteria
fields.description: Extract inclusion, exclusion, screening, and quality-assessment criteria.

fields.name: methods_reviewed
fields.description: Extract the main families of methods or approaches covered.

fields.name: datasets
fields.description: Extract datasets, benchmarks, populations, or corpora emphasized in the review.

fields.name: findings
fields.description: Extract the review's principal synthesized findings and trends.

fields.name: research_gaps
fields.description: Extract open problems, underexplored areas, and future research directions.

fields.name: limitation
fields.description: Extract limitations of the review methodology, coverage, or evidence base.
